name: Reverb
description: This algorithm offers a classic algorithmic reverb effect. It does not seek to emulate any particular hardware, or for that matter, any particular physical reverberant space.

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Sets the size of the reverb space – mainly affects the times of the early reflections.

parameters.name: High damp
parameters.description: Sets the amount of high frequency damping in the reverb tail.

parameters.name: Modulation speed
parameters.description: Sets the speed of reverb modulation.

parameters.name: Modulation depth
parameters.description: Sets the depth of reverb modulation.

parameters.name: Early gain
parameters.description: Sets the output level of the early reflections.

parameters.name: Diffuse gain
parameters.description: Sets the output level of the diffuse reflections.

parameters.name: Output mode
parameters.description: The standard Add/Replace mode selector as described above.
